admissible_pattern_families.ratchet_translation: keep layered context/state shells small, append-safe, and explicit instead of re-explaining whole threads
keep specs, plans, and implementation artifacts coupled enough that spec surfaces remain live and read
treat planning, bounded delegation, and verification as workflow discipline, not as a replacement controller substrate
treat memory as scoped sidecar/history support rather than as canonical A2/A1 memory or graph ownership

adapt_away_from: quantum or attractor rhetoric as canonical substrate law
Context-Engineering.keep: append-safe context shells, layered state framing, protocol-shell discipline, and hierarchical context structure

adapt_away_from: graph or vector-db substrate ownership claims
mem0.keep: user/session/agent/run scoping, mutation history, and export/import memory-sidecar patterns

spec-kit.keep: explicit constitution/spec/plan/tasks separation and executable-spec coupling discipline

superpowers.keep: plan-before-implementation discipline, bounded subagent review, and verification-before-completion patterns

non_goals: No runtime import, service bootstrap, or training claim.
No canonical A2/A1 brain replacement claim.
No live automation or controller-substrate replacement claim.
No registry, graph, or external-service mutation.

ratchet_seam_mappings.current_role: standing A2 continuity and low-bloat context retention
keep spec surfaces coupled to active implementation and build order
bounded planning, review, and selector discipline without adopting an external workflow host
scoped outside-memory support without canonical brain replacement

recommended_actions: Keep this first slice audit-only and treat it as a cluster-entry map, not as a runtime or service import.
If this cluster continues, choose one bounded follow-on only after explicit reselection instead of widening context, specs, workflow, and memory all at once.
Use the extracted pattern families to tighten existing Ratchet seams before proposing any new substrate or automation claims.
source_family: Context-Engineering / spec-kit / superpowers / mem0 source set
